title: Shulkers: Reloaded
description: Smooths shulker box textures by removing jagged outlines.
body:
# Shulkers: Reloaded
*Refines shulker box textures by removing the jagged outline for a cleaner, more polished appearance. Enhances undyed shulkers with a darker bottom half for improved contrast and visual depth compared to the vanilla version.*

## Features
  - Eliminated rough edge lines on all shulker variants
  - Darkened bottom half of undyed shulkers for better visual contrast

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
